title: Real MCP read-only resources implementation
goal: Implement or explicitly defer a protocol-level RepoBrief MCP server/resource surface for existing snapshots, distinct from already verified read-only access and MCP boundary documentation.

acceptance.assertion: Concrete MCP resources such as repobrief://snapshot/{stem}/manifest and canonical/reading-pack/health/availability are implemented or a precise blocker is recorded.
Resource reads cannot create snapshots, refresh bundles, touch Git, run shells, inspect secrets, open PRs or apply patches.
Every MCP resource/tool result carries health/freshness/availability or explains why it cannot.

metadata.rbv1_t010_clarification: RBV1-T010 is verified for read-only access and MCP-boundary-equivalent surfaces, not a protocol-level MCP server/resource implementation.
metadata.selection_reason: Direct continuation: code-level MCP-shaped read-only handlers exist; next useful slice is concrete protocol resource/read surface implementation.
